name: Gradient Wave Sample
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="url(#bgGradient)"/>
  
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="bgGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#667eea"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#764ba2"/>
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="waveGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.1"/>
          <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.3"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.1"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      
      <!-- Background gradient -->
      <rect width="450" height="450" fill="url(#bgGradient)"/>
      
      <!-- Wave effects -->
      <path d="M 0 150 Q 112.5 120, 225 150 T 450 150 L 450 250 Q 337.5 220, 225 250 T 0 250 Z" 
            fill="url(#waveGradient)"/>
      <path d="M 0 200 Q 112.5 170, 225 200 T 450 200 L 450 300 Q 337.5 270, 225 300 T 0 300 Z" 
            fill="url(#waveGradient)"/>
      <path d="M 0 300 Q 112.5 270, 225 300 T 450 300 L 450 400 Q 337.5 370, 225 400 T 0 400 Z" 
            fill="url(#waveGradient)" opacity="0.5"/>
      
      <!-- Frosted glass clock face -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="160" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="160" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
      
      <!-- Hour markers -->
      <line x1="225" y1="80" x2="225" y2="95" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="297.5" y1="99.4263164512564" x2="290" y2="112.41669750802298" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="350.5736835487436" y1="152.5" x2="337.58330249197707" y2="160" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="370" y1="225" x2="355" y2="225" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="350.5736835487436" y1="297.5" x2="337.58330249197707" y2="290" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="297.5" y1="350.5736835487436" x2="290" y2="337.583302491977" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="225" y1="370" x2="225" y2="355" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="152.50000000000003" y1="350.5736835487436" x2="160.00000000000003" y2="337.58330249197707" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="99.42631645125638" y1="297.5" x2="112.41669750802296" y2="290" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="80" y1="225.00000000000003" x2="95" y2="225.00000000000003" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="99.4263164512564" y1="152.5" x2="112.41669750802298" y2="160" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="152.49999999999994" y1="99.42631645125643" x2="159.99999999999994" y2="112.41669750802299" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      
      <!-- Selected hour numbers -->
      <text x="225" y="105" fill="#ffffff" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="bold">12</text>
      <text x="345" y="225" fill="#ffffff" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="bold">3</text>
      <text x="225" y="345" fill="#ffffff" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="bold">6</text>
      <text x="105" y="225.00000000000003" fill="#ffffff" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="bold">9</text>
      
      <!-- Clock hands -->
      
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="287.6086525481931" y2="175.19882906899045" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="116.26567245104482" y2="241.63869022719422" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="184.82779073125684" y2="348.63734711837" stroke="#ff6b6b" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="10" fill="#ff6b6b" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="1"/>
  
    
</svg>
